visual_description: A medium shot captures two men in an office setting, both dressed in white button-down shirts. The man on the left, who has a lanyard around his neck, is bent over a desk, looking at a laptop. He holds a small, white, rectangular object in his hand. The man on the right stands and watches him, holding a clear plastic cup with a white, lumpy substance in it. In the background, another person is visible, hunched over their own work. The office has a cool, blue-toned lighting. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The audio is dominated by the loud, insistent, and high-pitched beeping of a digital alarm, creating a sense of urgency and a need for immediate attention. The camera zooms in for a close-up on the two men. The man on the left, with the object in his mouth, looks at the other man. The man on the right, still holding the cup, looks down and then begins to eat the white substance from his hand. A man speaks in a calm and polite tone, saying, "那，谢谢" (Nà, xièxiè), which translates to "Well, thank you
